candidate_pool_rule.U2_risk_sane: U1 + exclude extreme limit-move path, extreme volatility/turnover, and absolute-high names

quality.label_spec: full-fit ranker trained on historical forward_1m_excess_vs_market relevance; target report month has no label requirement
quality.pit_policy: target features are signal-date rows; full-fit model uses only labeled months before report_signal_date
quality.universe_filter: candidate_pool_pass in selected pool; no alpha filter outside model ranking
quality.industry_map_source: industry_level1/2 columns from M2 canonical dataset
quality.data_quality_report: M2/M5/M6 artifacts plus current M7 feature_coverage/candidate_pool_width files
quality.validation_window: M6 historical walk-forward evidence stem: not_found
quality.test_window: 2024-04-30 recommendation month, unlabeled at report time
quality.cv_policy: historical evidence uses walk_forward_by_signal_month; current report uses full-fit on past labeled months
quality.hyperparameter_policy: fixed M6 watchlist hyperparameters; no random CV and no target-month tuning
quality.buyability_policy: selected rows must pass candidate_pool_pass; buyability column reports t+1 open status
